content.json:
{
  "version": "KqlItem/1.0",
  "query": "let wo = tostring('{WorkOrderNumber}');\nlet lookback = totimespan({LookbackHours}h);\ntraces\n| where timestamp > ago(lookback)\n| where message has wo or tostring(customDimensions.WorkOrderNumber) == wo\n| project timestamp, severityLevel, message, customDimensions\n| order by timestamp asc",
  "size": 1,
  "queryType": 0,
  "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components"
}

{
  "version": "KqlItem/1.0",
  "query": "let wo = tostring('{WorkOrderNumber}');\nlet lookback = totimespan({LookbackHours}h);\nexceptions\n| where timestamp > ago(lookback)\n| where outerMessage has wo or tostring(customDimensions.WorkOrderNumber) == wo\n| project timestamp, type, outerMessage, customDimensions, details\n| order by timestamp asc",
  "size": 1,
  "queryType": 0,
  "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components"
}

{
  "version": "KqlItem/1.0",
  "query": "let wo = tostring('{WorkOrderNumber}');
let lookback = totimespan({LookbackHours}h);
traces
| where timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where message has 'Delta.Payload.Outbound JSON_CHUNK'
| where message has wo or tostring(customDimensions.WorkOrderNumber) == wo
| project timestamp, message, customDimensions
| order by timestamp asc",
  "size": 1,
  "queryType": 0,
  "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components"
}
